---
title: "Gurjot Singh"
about:
  template: jolla
  image: images/profile_pic.jpg
toc: false
---

PhD | Humboldt-Universität zu Berlin  
Computational Chemistry

<!-- Seeking Postdoctoral Opportunities -->

My PhD work focused on studying Molecular Magnetism  
in Transition Metal Complexes using Multireference Methods.

---

:::: {.highlights-section}
::: {.highlight-card}
### 🔬 Research
[Learn more →](research/research.qmd)
:::

::: {.highlight-card}
### 📄 Publications
[See publications →](publications/publications.qmd)
:::

::: {.highlight-card}
### 📝 Blog
[Read posts →](blog/index.qmd)
:::
::::
